summary: A marginally cleaner tape that still requires speed correction; the performance itself isn’t described.
review: The reviewer notes this copy is a bit clearer than previous versions but suffers from incorrect tape speed, indicating a need for further mastering work. No comments are made about the musical performance, set flow, or individual musicians, leaving the show quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single brief review focused on recording problems; no positive musical feedback to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Slightly cleaner copy but speed is off and needs correction; no other sound quality details provided.
